attempted_inference: Inspectable internal Fork record establishes external admissibility, compliance, approval, legal sufficiency, customer acceptance, or authority.

failure_mode.why_invalid: The external conclusion requires a separate authority source, rule, standard, claim boundary, or decision process.

fork_non_authority_statement: Fork does not approve, certify, score, authorize, determine compliance, determine admissibility, establish legal sufficiency, decide acceptance, or judge correctness.
